mapper.select: /*getWasnifList*/ SELECT CONCAT(WA.COMPKEY, WA.EOASNKY, WA.EOASNIT) as ROWKEY , WA.COMPKEY , WA.EOASNKY , WA.EOASNIT , WA.WAREKEY , WA.DOCCATE , WA.DOCTYPE , MD.DOCTYNM , WA.ASNSTAT , (SELECT COMCDTX FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND COMCDKY = 'ASNSTAT' AND COMCDVL = WA.ASNSTAT ) as ASNSNAM , MD.FRLOCKY as RVLOCKY , ML.LOCANAM , date_format(WA.ASNDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as ASNDATE , WA.OWNERKY , WA.SKUMKEY , WA.SKUDESC , WA.POITQTY , WA.ASNDQTY , WA.RCHSQTY , WA.ASNDQTY - WA.RCHSQTY as RCVEQTY , MS.SKUWABC , WA.COPODKY , WA.COPODIT , WA.REFSODC , WA.EXPIDAT , WA.REFSOIT , WA.LOTAT17 , WA.LOTAT18 , WA.RCVSRMK as RCVRSNM , MS.UPCCODE , MO.OWNAMLC as OWNAMLC , MA.WHNAMLC as WHNAMLC FROM WASNIF WA INNER JOIN MSKUWC MS on MS.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MS.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY and MS.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY and MS.SKUMKEY = WA.SKUMKEY INNER JOIN MDOCMA MD on MD.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MD.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY and MD.DOCCATE = WA.DOCCATE and MD.DOCTYPE = WA.DOCTYPE INNER JOIN MLOCMA ML on ML.COMPKEY = MD.COMPKEY and ML.WAREKEY = MD.WAREKEY and ML.LOCAKEY = MD.FRLOCKY INNER JOIN MOWRMA MO on MO.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MO.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY INNER JOIN MWARMA MA on MA.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MA.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY WHERE WA.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND (WA.EOASNKY, WA.EOASNIT) NOT IN ( SELECT W.EOASNKY, W.EOASNIT FROM WRCVIT W WHERE W.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND W.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND W.RCVDCST = 'RVPART' AND W.PMTINYN = 'Y' ) AND WA.ASNSTAT IN ('NEW','ING') AND WA.DOCCATE = '400' AND WA.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND WA.EOASNKY = #{eoasnky} ORDER BY WA.ASNDATE asc, WA.SKUDESC asc
/* selectRcvdcky */ SELECT fn_wm_rcvdcky() as rcvdcky from dual

/* selectWmp40List */ select concat(WS.OWNERKY , MAX(WS.STOCKKY)) as rowkey , WS.OWNERKY as ownerky , WS.SKUMKEY as skumkey , WS.SKUDESC as skudesc , WS.WAREKEY as warekey , WS.AREAKEY as areakey , WS.ZONEKEY as zonekey , WS.LOCAKEY as locakey , WS.STOCKKY as stockky , SUM(WS.STOTQTY) as stotqty , SUM(WS.STOTQTY) as fordqty , SUM(WS.SALLQTY) as sallqty , SUM(WS.SINBQTY) as sinbqty , SUM(WS.SOUBQTY) as soubqty , SUM(WS.SBLOQTY) as sbloqty , MS.PACKKEY as packkey , MS.TRUNTYP as druntyp , WS.TRUNPID as trunpid , WS.STKSTAT as stkstat , WS.LOTAT01 as lotat01 , WS.LOTAT02 as lotat02 , WS.LOTAT03 as lotat03 , WS.LOTAT04 as lotat04 , WS.LOTAT05 as lotat05 , WS.LOTAT06 as lotat06 , WS.LOTAT07 as lotat07 , WS.LOTAT08 as lotat08 , WS.LOTAT09 as lotat09 , WS.LOTAT10 as lotat10 , WS.LOTAT11 as lotat11 , WS.LOTAT12 as lotat12 , WS.LOTAT13 as lotat13 , WS.LOTAT14 as lotat14 , WS.LOTAT15 as lotat15 , WS.LOTAT16 as lotat16 , WS.LOTAT17 as lotat17 , WS.LOTAT18 as lotat18 , WS.LOTAT19 as lotat19 , WS.LOTAT20 as lotat20 , WS.LOTNMKY as lotnmky , WS.RCVDCKY as rcvdcky , WS.RCVDCIT as rcvdcit , IF(WS.TRUNTYP = ' ', '', WS.TRUNTYP) as truntyp , date_format(WR.RCVDCDT, '%Y-%m-%d') as RCVDCDT , '0' as paldqty , '0' as paletck , fn_com_todate(WS.CREDATE) as CREDATE, fn_com_totime(WS.CRETIME) as CRETIME, fn_sy_usernam(WS.COMPKEY, WS.CREUSER) as CREUSER , fn_com_todate(WS.LMODATE) as LMODATE, fn_com_totime(WS.LMOTIME) as LMOTIME, fn_sy_usernam(WS.COMPKEY, WS.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER , WS.INDIBZL, WS.INDIARC, WS.UPDTCHK, MS.UPCCODE , MO.OWNAMLC as OWNAMLC from WSTKKY WS INNER JOIN WRCVIT WR ON WR.COMPKEY = WS.COMPKEY AND WR.WAREKEY = WR.WAREKEY AND WR.OWNERKY = WS.OWNERKY AND WR.RCVDCKY = WS.RCVDCKY AND WR.RCVDCIT = WS.RCVDCIT INNER JOIN MSKUWC MS ON MS.COMPKEY = WS.COMPKEY AND MS.WAREKEY = WR.WAREKEY AND MS.OWNERKY = WS.OWNERKY AND MS.SKUMKEY = WS.SKUMKEY AND MS.SKUDESC = WS.SKUDESC INNER JOIN MOWRMA MO ON MO.COMPKEY = WS.COMPKEY AND MO.OWNERKY = WS.OWNERKY where WS.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and WS.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and WS.AREAKEY = 'RCV' and WS.ZONEKEY = 'RCVZ' and (WS.STOTQTY != 0 and WS.SALLQTY = 0 and WS.SINBQTY = 0 and WS.SOUBQTY = 0 and WS.SBLOQTY = 0) GROUP BY WS.OWNERKY, WS.WAREKEY, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC, WS.AREAKEY, WS.ZONEKEY, WS.LOCAKEY, WR.RCVDCDT, WS.STOCKKY ORDER BY WS.RCVDCKY, WS.RCVDCIT
/* getTaskoky */ select fn_wm_taskoky() as taskoky from dual

/*getWtakitList*/ select concat(A.COMPKEY , A.TASKOKY) as rowkey , A.COMPKEY as compkey , A.TASKOKY as taskoky , A.TASKOIT as taskoit , A.WAREKEY as warekey , A.DOCCATE as doccate , A.DOCTYPE as doctype , A.OWNERKY as ownerky , A.SKUMKEY as skumkey , m.SKUDESC as skudesc , A.FRAREKY as frareky , A.FRZONKY as frzonky , A.FRLOCKY as frlocky , A.FORDQTY as fordqty , A.FUOMEKY as fuomeky , A.TOAREKY as toareky , A.TOZONKY as tozonky , A.TOLOCKY as tolocky , A.FORDQTY as tcmpqty , A.PKRSNCD as pkrsncd , A.PKRSNNM as pkrsnnm , fn_com_todate(A.CREDATE) as credate , fn_com_totime(A.CRETIME) as cretime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.CREUSER) as creuser , fn_com_todate(A.LMODATE) as lmodate , fn_com_totime(A.LMOTIME) as lmotime , fn_sy_usernam(A.COMPKEY , A.LMOUSER) as lmouser , A.INDIBZL as indibzl , A.INDIARC as indiarc , 0 as updtchk, MA1.AREANAM AS frarenm, MA2.AREANAM AS toarenm, MZ1.ZONENAM AS frzonnm, MZ2.ZONENAM AS tozonnm, ML1.LOCANAM AS frlocnm, ML2.LOCANAM AS tolocnm ,m.UPCCODE from WTAKIT A inner join MSKUWC m on m.compkey = A.COMPKEY and m.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY and m.OWNERKY = A.OWNERKY and m.SKUMKEY = A.SKUMKEY LEFT JOIN MAREMA MA1 ON MA1.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY AND MA1.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY AND MA1.AREAKEY = A.FRAREKY LEFT JOIN MZONMA MZ1 ON MZ1.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY AND MZ1.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY AND MZ1.AREAKEY = A.FRAREKY AND MZ1.ZONEKEY = A.FRZONKY LEFT JOIN MLOCMA ML1 ON ML1.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY AND ML1.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY AND ML1.LOCAKEY = A.FRLOCKY LEFT JOIN MAREMA MA2 ON MA2.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY AND MA2.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY AND MA2.AREAKEY = A.TOAREKY LEFT JOIN MZONMA MZ2 ON MZ2.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY AND MZ2.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY AND MZ2.ZONEKEY = A.TOZONKY LEFT JOIN MLOCMA ML2 ON ML2.COMPKEY = A.COMPKEY AND ML2.WAREKEY = A.WAREKEY AND ML2.LOCAKEY = A.TOLOCKY where A.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and A.TASKSTS = 'TASK' and A.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and A.DOCCATE = '500' and A.DOCTYPE = '560' order by TASKOKY , TASKOIT

/* "selectWasnifList" */ select COMPKEY, EOASNKY, EOASNIT, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, ASNSTAT, ASNDATE, ASNTIME, OWNERKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SKUSKEY, SIRBCOD, POITQTY, PUOMKEY, ASNDQTY, AUOMKEY, TRUNTYP, RCHSQTY, RCHPQTY, RCHSUOM, VENDKEY, CARRKEY, TRUCKNO, TRUCTON, ASNMEMO, PRODDAT, SHELIFE, EXPIDAT, CUSTKEY, DESTKEY, STKSTAT, RSNCODE, RCVSRMK, COPODKY, COPODIT, REFSODC, REFSOIT, REFDNDC, REFDNIT, REFSDDC, REFSDIT, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, INDIBZL, INDIARC, UPDTCHK from WASNIF where eoasnky = #{eoasnky} and compkey = #{compkey}

/*getWmp90WasnifList*/ SELECT CONCAT(WA.COMPKEY, WA.EOASNKY, WA.EOASNIT) as ROWKEY , WA.COMPKEY , WA.EOASNKY , WA.EOASNIT , WA.WAREKEY , WA.DOCCATE , WA.DOCTYPE , MD.DOCTYNM , WA.ASNSTAT , (SELECT COMCDTX FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND COMCDKY = 'ASNSTAT' AND COMCDVL = WA.ASNSTAT ) as ASNSNAM , MD.FRLOCKY as RVLOCKY , ML.LOCANAM , date_format(WA.ASNDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as ASNDATE , WA.OWNERKY , WA.SKUMKEY , WA.SKUDESC , WA.POITQTY , WA.ASNDQTY , WA.RCHSQTY , WA.ASNDQTY - WA.RCHSQTY as RCVEQTY , MS.SKUWABC , WA.COPODKY , WA.COPODIT , WA.REFSODC , WA.REFSOIT , WA.LOTAT17 , WA.LOTAT18 , WA.RCVSRMK as RCVRSNM , MS.UPCCODE , MO.OWNAMLC as OWNAMLC , MA.WHNAMLC as WHNAMLC , MS.PROPQTY , MS.SALFQTY , WS.STOTQTY FROM WASNIF WA left outer join ( select COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, SKUMKEY, SUM(STOTQTY) AS STOTQTY from WSTKKY where AREAKEY IN ('RCV', 'STG') group by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, SKUMKEY ) WS on WS.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and WS.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY and WS.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY and WS.SKUMKEY = WA.SKUMKEY INNER JOIN MSKUWC MS on MS.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MS.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY and MS.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY and MS.SKUMKEY = WA.SKUMKEY INNER JOIN MDOCMA MD on MD.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MD.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY and MD.DOCCATE = WA.DOCCATE and MD.DOCTYPE = WA.DOCTYPE INNER JOIN MLOCMA ML on ML.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and ML.LOCAKEY = MD.FRLOCKY INNER JOIN MOWRMA MO on MO.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MO.OWNERKY = WA.OWNERKY INNER JOIN MWARMA MA on MA.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY and MA.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY WHERE WA.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND (WA.EOASNKY, WA.EOASNIT) NOT IN ( SELECT W.EOASNKY, W.EOASNIT FROM WRCVIT W WHERE W.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND W.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND W.RCVDCST = 'RVPART' AND W.PMTINYN = 'Y' ) AND WA.ASNSTAT IN ('NEW','ING') AND WA.DOCCATE = '400' AND WA.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND WA.EOASNKY = #{eoasnky} ORDER BY WA.ASNDATE asc, WA.SKUDESC asc
/* "selectWmp90Eoasnky" */ select fn_wm_eoasnky() as eoasnky from dual
mapper.insert: /* saveWmp90Ocopur */ insert into OCOPUR ( COMPKEY, COPODKY, COPODIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, PURSTAT, PURDATE, PURTIME, VENDKEY, OWNERKY, SKUSKEY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, RCHSQTY, POITQTY, RCVWHKY, REQDATE, REQTIME, COOUTIT, VNDCFYN, VNDCFDT, VNDCFTM, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) values ( #{userData.compkey}, #{copodky}, #{copodit}, #{doccate}, #{doctype}, #{purstat}, to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), #{vendkey}, #{ownerky}, #{skumkey}, #{skumkey}, (SELECT SKUDESC FROM MSKUWC WHERE WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND OWNERKY = #{ownerky} AND SKUMKEY = #{skumkey}), #{rcveqty}, #{rcveqty}, #{warekey}, to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), 0, 'Y', to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), #{userData.useract}, to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select: /*selectWrcvitList*/ SELECT WR.RCVDCKY, WR.RCVDCIT, WA.WAREKEY, WA.DOCCATE, WA.DOCTYPE, WR.RCVDCST, WR.RCVITST, WA.ASNSTAT, date_format(str_to_date(WR.RCVDCDT, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') as RCVDCDT, date_format(str_to_date(WR.RCVDCTM, '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') as RCVDCTM, WA.OWNERKY, WA.SKUMKEY, WA.SKUDESC, WA.ASNDQTY, IFNULL(SUM(WR.RCHSQTY),0) as RCHSQTY, WT.TOLOCKY, date_format(str_to_date(WA.ASNDATE, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') as ASNDATE, MW.WHNAMLC, MO.OWNAMLC, ML.LOCANAM, MC.COMCDTX, WR.RVLOCKY, MLO.LOCANAM as RVLOCNA FROM WASNIF WA INNER JOIN WRCVIT WR ON WR.COMPKEY = WA.COMPKEY AND WR.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY AND WR.EOASNKY = WA.EOASNKY AND WR.EOASNIT = WA.EOASNIT LEFT JOIN WTAKIT WT ON WR.COMPKEY = WT.COMPKEY AND WR.WAREKEY = WT.WAREKEY AND WR.RCVDCKY = WT.RCVDCKY AND WR.RCVDCIT = WT.RCVDCIT INNER JOIN MWARMA MW ON WA.COMPKEY = MW.COMPKEY AND WA.WAREKEY = MW.WAREKEY INNER JOIN MOWRMA MO ON WA.COMPKEY = MO.COMPKEY AND WA.OWNERKY = MO.OWNERKY LEFT JOIN MLOCMA ML ON WT.COMPKEY = ML.COMPKEY AND WT.WAREKEY = ML.WAREKEY AND WT.TOLOCKY = ML.LOCAKEY INNER JOIN MLOCMA MLO ON WR.COMPKEY = MLO.COMPKEY AND WR.WAREKEY = MLO.WAREKEY AND WR.RVLOCKY = MLO.LOCAKEY INNER JOIN V_MCODEM MC ON WA.COMPKEY = MC.COMPKEY AND MC.COMCDKY = 'ASNSTAT' AND WA.ASNSTAT = MC.COMCDVL WHERE WA.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND WA.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND WA.EOASNKY = #{eoasnky} AND WR.RCVDCST NOT IN ('CANFULL') GROUP BY WA.SKUMKEY ORDER BY WR.RCVDCST DESC, WR.RCVITST DESC, WR.RCVDCDT

/*getDispatchPLTList*/ SELECT TT.VHPLNKY, MIN(TT.SAATC06) as SAATC06, TT.SAATC07, TT.SAATC08 , TD.VEHICKY, TD.POSTDAT ,TD.SHTRTKY , MIN(TT.SAATC10) as MINTC10, MAX(TT.SAATC10) as MAXTC10 , TV.VEHICKY, TV.VHCFNAM , (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(TP.VEHICKY), 0) as SUMVEHI FROM TPLNHD TP WHERE TP.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND TP.SHTRTKY = TD.SHTRTKY AND TP.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TP.VEHICKY = TD.VEHICKY AND POSTDAT = date_format(NOW() , '%Y%m%d')) as SUMVEHI ,OL.TRNSTAT, OL.DESTKEY, IFNULL(OC.MCATENM,TT.SAATC08) as MCATENM FROM TPLNIT TT INNER JOIN TPLNHD TD ON TD.COMPKEY = TD.COMPKEY AND TD.WAREKEY = TT.WAREKEY AND TD.VHPLNKY = TT.VHPLNKY INNER JOIN OCOSAL OL ON TT.COMPKEY = OL.COMPKEY AND TT.SAATC06 = OL.SAATC06 AND TT.COOUTKY = OL.COOUTKY AND TT.COOUTIT = OL.COOUTIT INNER JOIN TVHCMA TV ON TD.COMPKEY = TV.COMPKEY AND TD.WAREKEY = TV.WAREKEY AND TD.VEHICKY = TV.VEHICKY LEFT JOIN OCATMA OC ON OC.COMPKEY = TT.COMPKEY AND OC.WAREKEY = TT.WAREKEY AND OC.MCATECD = TT.SAATC08 WHERE TT.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND TT.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TT.VHPLNKY = ( SELECT VHPLNKY FROM TPLNIT WHERE SAATC06 = #{saatc06} AND SHTRSTS = 'PLAN' LIMIT 1 ) AND TT.SHTRSTS != 'LOADING' GROUP BY TT.SAATC06 ORDER BY MINTC10, TT.SAATC06

/*getTmp05TvhcmaList*/ SELECT TV.VEHICKY, TV.VHCFNAM , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(TP.VEHICKY), 0) FROM TPLNHD TP WHERE TP.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND TP.SHTRTKY = #{shtrtky} AND TP.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TP.VEHICKY = TV.VEHICKY AND TP.PLNSTAT IN ('PLAN', 'LOADING') AND TP.VHPDATE = date_format(NOW() , '%Y%m%d') ) as SUMVEHI FROM TSHRVH TS INNER JOIN TVHCMA TV ON TS.COMPKEY = TV.COMPKEY AND TS.WAREKEY = TV.WAREKEY AND TS.VEHICKY = TV.VEHICKY WHERE TS.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND TS.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TS.SHTRTKY = #{shtrtky} GROUP BY TV.VEHICKY ORDER BY SUMVEHI

/*getTmp05NoneDispatchPlt*/ SELECT OC.SAATC06, OC.POSTDAT, MIN(OC.SAATC10) as MINTC10, MAX(OC.SAATC10) as MAXTC10, OC.SAATC07, OC.SAATC08, TS.SHTRTKY, TS.SHTRTNM, OC.DESTKEY, OC.TRNSTAT, IFNULL(OCA.MCATENM,OC.SAATC08) as MCATENM FROM OCOSAL OC FORCE INDEX(IX_OCOSAL03) LEFT JOIN TSHRHD TS ON OC.COMPKEY = TS.COMPKEY AND OC.DESTKEY = TS.DESTKEY LEFT JOIN OCATMA OCA ON OCA.COMPKEY = OC.COMPKEY AND OCA.WAREKEY = OC.TOWARKY AND OCA.MCATECD = OC.SAATC08 WHERE OC.COMPKEY=#{userData.compkey} AND OC.SALSTAT='ORDFM' AND OC.TRNSTAT='NEW' AND OC.SAATC06=#{saatc06} GROUP BY OC.SAATC06
/* selectVhplnky */ SELECT fn_tm_vhplnky() as vhplnky from dual

/*getTmp07DispatchPLTList*/ SELECT TT.VHPLNKY, MIN(TT.SAATC06) as SAATC06, TT.SAATC07, TT.SAATC08 , TD.VEHICKY, TD.POSTDAT ,TD.SHTRTKY , MIN(TT.SAATC10) as MINTC10, MAX(TT.SAATC10) as MAXTC10 , TV.VEHICKY, TV.VHCFNAM , (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(TP.VEHICKY), 0) as SUMVEHI FROM TPLNHD TP WHERE TP.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND TP.SHTRTKY = TD.SHTRTKY AND TP.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TP.VEHICKY = TD.VEHICKY AND POSTDAT = date_format(NOW() , '%Y%m%d')) as SUMVEHI ,OL.TRNSTAT, OL.DESTKEY, IFNULL(OC.MCATENM, TT.SAATC08) as MCATENM FROM TPLNIT TT INNER JOIN TPLNHD TD ON TD.COMPKEY = TD.COMPKEY AND TD.WAREKEY = TT.WAREKEY AND TD.VHPLNKY = TT.VHPLNKY INNER JOIN OCOSAL OL ON TT.COMPKEY = OL.COMPKEY AND TT.SAATC06 = OL.SAATC06 AND TT.COOUTKY = OL.COOUTKY AND TT.COOUTIT = OL.COOUTIT INNER JOIN TVHCMA TV ON TD.COMPKEY = TV.COMPKEY AND TD.WAREKEY = TV.WAREKEY AND TD.VEHICKY = TV.VEHICKY LEFT JOIN OCATMA OC ON OC.COMPKEY = TT.COMPKEY AND OC.WAREKEY = TT.WAREKEY AND OC.MCATECD = TT.SAATC08 WHERE TT.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND TT.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TT.VHPLNKY = ( SELECT VHPLNKY FROM TPLNIT WHERE SAATC06 = #{saatc06} AND SHTRSTS IN ('PLAN','LOADING') LIMIT 1 ) AND TT.SHTRSTS IN ('PLAN','LOADING') GROUP BY TT.SAATC06 ORDER BY MINTC10 , TT.SAATC06
select FN_OM_COOUTKY() from dual
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OCOSAL ( COMPKEY , COOUTKY , COOUTIT , DOCCATE , DOCTYPE , POSTDAT , SALDATE , SALTIME , TOWARKY , CUSTKEY , SKUSKEY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , DESTKEY , OWNERKY , SALSTAT , SAATC06 , SAATC03 , SALRQDT , SALRQTM , SOITQTY , RGITQTY , SUOMKEY , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER ) VALUES ( #{userData.compkey} , #{cooutky} , FN_OM_COOUTIT(#{userData.compkey} , #{cooutky}) , #{doccate} , #{doctype} , FN_WM_POSDATE(#{userData.compkey} , #{warekey}) , DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%H%i%s') , #{warekey} , #{custkey} , #{skuskey} , #{skumkey} , #{skudesc} , #{destkey} , #{ownerky} , #{salstat} , #{saatc06} , #{saatc03}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%H%i%s'), #{rgitqty} , #{rgitqty} , #{suomkey} , DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%H%i%s') , #{userData.useract} )
